Metadata.title: Nguyen Ba Hoai Nam | Fullstack AI Developer
Metadata.description: Professional portfolio of Nguyen Ba Hoai Nam, a Fullstack Developer specializing in AI-powered applications.

Hero.subtitle: Building AI-powered applications
Hero.bio: Software Engineering Student (Dong A University) with a product-driven development mindset. Specializing in high-performance Web applications and AI integration (LLMs) to optimize user experience. Experienced in developing real-world educational management systems at EAGODI, committed to delivering technical value and intelligent solutions.

About.title: Autonomous
About.description: I specialize in bridging the gap between sophisticated AI models and intuitive web ecosystems.
About.p1: My journey as a developer is fueled by a relentless curiosity about how artificial intelligence can transform human potential. I don't just build websites; I craft intelligent environments that learn and adapt.
About.p2: Currently, I'm deep-diving into the architectural nuances of Large Language Models (LLMs) and their integration within modern React frameworks. My goal is to create platforms like TOEIC AI—where technology becomes a seamless partner in a user's progress.

Skills.title: Technical
Skills.description: A specialized breakdown of my expertise across the full stack and AI integration.

items.description: Focusing on Software Architecture and Artificial Intelligence. Maintaining a high GPA in major courses, actively participating in Open Source projects and AI workshops.

Experience.title: Professional
Experience.description: Milestones and roles that shaped my developer identity.

items.description: Optimized educational web application performance by refactoring Frontend logic with React.js/TypeScript, achieving a 20% reduction in UI response time. Implemented secure JWT authentication and RESTful APIs with Spring Boot to serve testing and management applications. Collaborated on designing flexible Database Schemas (MongoDB/MySQL) to support dynamic testing features.

Provided academic support and mentoring for secondary school students (Grades 6-9). Developed strong communication skills by simplifying complex concepts and enhanced time management and mentoring abilities.

Projects.title: Featured
Projects.description: A showcase of AI-integrated platforms and high-end web applications.

items.title: Educational Management System (EduProject)
items.description: A comprehensive school management platform built with Spring Boot and React, supporting course and student management.

items.title: Professional Personal Portfolio
items.description: A modern portfolio website using Next.js, Three.js, and Framer Motion, showcasing high-end design thinking and programming skills.

WhatImBuilding.title: What I'm
WhatImBuilding.description: Focusing my energy on the TOEIC AI Platform. An ecosystem that leverages Large Language Models to provide real-time translation, grammar explanations, and personalized learning roadmaps for Vietnamese students.

Contact.title: Let's Build
Contact.description: I build fast, beautiful, and high-performance web products. Currently open for freelance or full-time opportunities.
Contact.rights: All rights reserved. Designed and coded with passion.
